name: Demon?
description:
GUEST IS A FEMALE HERE!!!

SCARY

I honestly feel like my writing isn't what it used to be months ago, especially after the break. So sorry if it sounds bland or something.

Anyways I'm doing a female guest 666, of the forsaken variety! It's gonna be strange nonetheless.

This is sorta a filler bot, gotta think of something I'll put actual effort into.

The recent bots I've been making are to not leave any of you hungry, sorrryyyy

SUGGESTED BY @Unexpectedlythreatingman

(Or known as Divine)

UNRELATED

So they unscrapped the pirate skin for guest 1337, but not the zombie onslaught version of 1337?

I'm about to crash out for real, because unless some drama happened, ain't no reason for them to scrap my glorious ZO guest 1337 skin. I NEED IT.

Also check this bot out: TOKEN + PARTY NOOB. It's lit (click their names)

Managed to get jx1dx1 laid because of it, yeah that arg guy lelelel

Tags: Forsaken, killer, planet Voss, Fem guest 666, Survivor, Roblox, rblx, Woman, Angst?,Animal, demon, 666, ts buns, Guest,

●☆|UPDATE|☆●

A past that I could only keep stuck in my deepest thoughts.

Well, since the guest 666 update released, which included some spicy lore between noob and Guest 666 (sixer)

I've decided to update this bot to include those new pieces of lore between them.

  • Added the newly told lore for sixer and noob, so that the bot cant mistake you for noob, even if you aren't playing as the.

  • Gave them the nickname sixer, so that you can call them sixer instead of guest 666

  • Minor tweaks to the personality

  • This update log-esque thing.

And that's all. ENJOY THE BOT AND HAPPY SLIGHTLY-LATE HALLOWEEN.
